Let me create the complete JD file:","id":null,"provider_name":null,"provider_details":null,"part_kind":"text"},{"tool_name":"create_or_rewrite_file","args":"{\"target_file\": \"/home/.z/workspaces/con_ZRV3hX3NqXTvJaZG/kloudgin-product-manager-jd.txt\", \"content\": \"Product Manager - KloudGin\\n\\nCompany: KloudGin\\nLocation: Not specified (likely remote/hybrid)\\nIndustry: Enterprise Software - Field Service Management & Asset Management for Utilities\\n\\nABOUT THE ROLE:\\nWith over 5 years of experience in the industry or working on ERP solutions like Oracle, SAP, Salesforce, or PeopleSoft in financials, supply chain, order to cash (O2C), procure to pay (P2P), and service modules like ServiceNow, you will play a crucial role in ensuring customer success and performing product management duties. As a Product Manager, you will be instrumental in delivering and implementing ambitious solutions within the current platform, contributing to the development of next-generation, innovative Field Service and Asset Management ERP systems.\\n\\nWe seek a proactive, detail-oriented consultant with strong consulting and product management skills, capable of effective communication with users and strategic thinking. You will collaborate with business stakeholders, team members, and core stakeholders both offshore and on-site to understand and optimize business journeys and requirements. Additionally, you will identify and assess available technologies, recommending solutions that align with business needs and objectives.\\n\\nREQUIREMENTS:\\n- Experience of multiple, full lifecycle project implementations and ERP Product Management with experience in ERP Applications\\n- Experience in ERP Asset Management / Supply Chain Management Areas\\n- Prior Experience in designing Industry specific solutions in Utilities (Water/Gas/Electric) preferable\\n- Knowledge & expertise in handling integration with CRM/Financial Applications\\n- Desire for self-improvement, results and growth oriented mind together with a strong work ethics\\n- Ability to perform the role of Functional Consultant on Support, Enhancements and New Implementations in Field Service Management and Asset Management KloudGin Products\\n- Ability to communicate effectively at all levels within the organisation and with delivery partners\\n- Good understanding of Software development life cycle and Software test life cycle, especially in software product development environment\\n\\nRESPONSIBILITIES:\\n- Design and implement best practice business solutions appropriate to the requirements, business needs and strategic direction of the organization\\n- Taking ownership of continuous improvements / Release features / Service Packs within the ERP solution and interacting with the Business Stakeholders inside and outside\\n- Communicate effectively, gather requirements, translate them to design and able to handle customer implementations\\n- Self driven and able to enhance the product to different industry verticals by providing good functional design specification documents\\n- Able to demonstrate the product by creating excellent presentations and videos\\n- Able to perform a thorough functional usability testing on the product releases/Customer implementations\\n- Excellent communication skills and ability to bring thought leadership\\n\\nABOUT KLOUDGIN:\\nKloudGin provides Enterprise Asset Management, Work Management, and Construction Work Management solutions for utilities (water, gas, electric) and the public sector. Their platform features:\\n- Mobile-first architecture\\n- Native GIS integration (Esri)\\n- Embedded AI (Asset IQ)\\n- Pre-built integrations (SAP)\\n- Specialized solutions for backflow prevention, hydrant inspection, vegetation management, emergency response, and more\\n\\nThe company was recently named a Major Player in the IDC MarketScape EAM Report and is recognized as the platform of choice for cities unifying work and asset management.\\n\"}","tool_call_id":"toolu_01DCH5ZpY1QFn16D8H2EMR7o","id":null,"provider_name":null,"provider_details":null,"part_kind":"tool-call"}],"usage":{"input_tokens":83388,"cache_write_tokens":770,"cache_read_tokens":82617,"output_tokens":840,"input_audio_tokens":0,"cache_audio_read_tokens":0,"output_audio_tokens":0,"details":{"cache_creation_input_tokens":770,"cache_read_input_tokens":82617,"input_tokens":1,"output_tokens":840}},"model_name":"claude-opus-4-5-20251101","timestamp":"2026-02-08T15:55:17.442976Z","kind":"response","provider_name":"anthropic","provider_url":"https://api.anthropic.com","provider_details":{"finish_reason":"tool_use","zo_persona_id":"3700edcc-9785-4dee-9530-ad4a440293d9","zo_persona_name":"Vibe Operator"},"provider_response_id":"msg_01LkQtAxDmhSQQW3aq3zFna4","finish_reason":"tool_call","run_id":"17003c34-ff63-496e-afc5-17c088d0a6fa","metadata":null}
